title: D&D 2024 Species Variant (Lineage)
description: Schema for files in data/species_variants/ (also called lineages). A variant layers additional traits on a parent species; the parent's name is recorded in parent_species and resolved by the data loader.

darkvision.description: Variant-level override of darkvision range. Prefer the grant_darkvision effect on a trait.

spells_by_level.description: Legacy convenience map (cantrip/3/5/...). Canonical grant is grant_cantrip/grant_spell effects inside the trait.

cantrip_replacement.description: Class spell list from which the variant's cantrip may be swapped on long rest (e.g. High Elf -> Wizard).

spellcasting_ability_choice.description: If present, player chooses one of these abilities as the spellcasting ability for variant-granted spells.
